All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
BlockDataItemBuilder
Builder to easily create ItemStacks with BlockData
ChunkKey
Represents a key for storing MachineChunks in maps
Fuel
Fuel for furnace
Furnace
Virtual furnace object
FurnaceCookEvent
Called when an ItemStack is successfully cooked in a Furnace
FurnaceExtractEvent
Called when an ItemStack is removed from a Furnace
FurnaceFuelBurnEvent
Called when an ItemStack starts burning as a fuel in a Furnace
FurnaceManager
Manager for Machines
FurnaceProperties
Properties for Furnaces
FurnaceRecipe
Recipes for Furnaces
FurnaceTile
Represents a Tile that connects a tickable Furnace to a Block
ItemBuilder
Builder to easily create ItemStacks
Machine
Abstract machine class
MachineTick
Timer for ticking Machines
PotionItemBuilder
Builder to easily create potion ItemStacks
Properties
Base property class
PropertyHolder<P>
Interface for a Machine that holds properties
Recipe
Represents base class for recipes
RecipeManager
Recipe manager for Furnaces
Tile<M>
A tile that connects a tickable Machine to a Block
TileManager
Manager for Tiles and VirtualChunks
TileTick
 
Util
 
VirtualChunk
Represents a chunk which holds Tiles
